## Problem

What gap or pain does this address?

## Proposed solution

What you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Safety impact

Does this touch the policy engine, approval workflow, or evidence chain? If so, how does it preserve the fail-closed posture?
